steps.title: Inquiry & Consult
steps.desc: Fill out our quote form or give us a call. We'll schedule a free on-site consultation to assess your space and vision.

steps.title: Design & Select
steps.desc: We help you select materials that match your aesthetic, budget, and environment — with samples and expert guidance.

steps.title: Detailed Quote
steps.desc: You receive a transparent, itemized proposal. No surprises, no hidden fees — just a clear scope and fair price.

steps.title: Installation & Finish
steps.desc: Our crew arrives on time, works clean, and delivers a finished result that exceeds what you imagined.
